seem to help at all and sometimes messed

structure tags. Instead of doing male
and female, do male man, boy, dude, guy,
and female, woman, girl with no
indication of the verse. Because Sununo
will do a pretty damn good job of
understanding that that is the verse
without you explicitly telling it that.
have weirdness at zero, style influence
to 50. Now, let's create and watch the
magic unfold.
